svg.title: Country geography and measurement coverage
svg.desc: Coverage distributions contextualize concentration differences and sample-size imbalance.
svg.text: Coverage distributions contextualize concentration differences and sample-size imbalance.
Boxes show Q1–Q3; center line is median; whiskers use 1.5×IQR; dots are sampled outliers.
Raw counts on a log1p axis.
Raw counts on a log1p axis.
